news:news.news:title: Ukraine seeks drone deals with Saudi Arabia amid ongoing conflict, while African nations face oil supply disruptions due to the Iran war.
news:news.news:keywords: Ukraine-Saudi Arabia drone negotiations, African countries oil supply issues, Venezuela legal battles, Hungary election intimidation, Olympic sports gender policies

news:news.news:title: US markets experienced significant declines amid ongoing geopolitical tensions, while rising fuel prices and regulatory changes impact various sectors.
news:news.news:keywords: US market decline due to geopolitical tensions, Impact of Iran war on global supply chains, Ticketmaster fee increases after regulations, US Postal Service fuel surcharge, Potential fuel shortages in Europe

news:news.news:title: David Sacks has stepped down as the White House AI and Crypto Czar, while Apple discontinues the Mac Pro and Netflix raises subscription prices again.
news:news.news:keywords: AI policy changes, Apple product updates, streaming service price increases, robot vacuum sales, wireless charging technology

news:news.news:title: Italy advances to the World Cup playoff final, while the MLB sees record strikeouts and coaching changes in college basketball.
news:news.news:keywords: World Cup playoff updates, MLB Opening Day highlights, NCAA basketball coaching changes

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal advanced animal behaviors, potential health breakthroughs, and new insights into life on Earth and beyond.
news:news.news:keywords: animal intelligence and tool use, impact of dreams on sleep, long COVID research, Parkinson's disease breakthroughs, deep-sea biodiversity discoveries

news:news.news:title: Meta and YouTube have been found liable in a significant social media addiction trial, potentially affecting numerous similar cases in the US.
news:news.news:keywords: social media addiction lawsuits, US-Iran peace talks, Middle East conflict impact on aviation, UN resolution on slavery, Philippines energy crisis

news:news.news:title: Global stock markets rose on optimism over a potential Iran peace plan, while concerns about fuel shortages and rising costs persist.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran peace plan impact on global markets, US Postal Service fuel surcharge details, Europe fuel shortage warnings, AI datacenter construction moratorium, Delta Airlines service changes due to funding issues

news:news.news:title: Intel and LG Display may have achieved the best laptop battery life, surpassing competitors like Apple and Qualcomm.
news:news.news:keywords: laptop battery life advancements, Amazon Big Spring Sale deals, Meta layoffs and AI investment, Spotify artist protection features, gaming console price increases

news:news.news:title: The Boston Celtics ended the Oklahoma City Thunder's 12-game winning streak, while various controversies and predictions shape the sports landscape.
news:news.news:keywords: Celtics vs. Thunder game recap, Puka Nacua lawsuit details, MLB season predictions, March Madness Sweet 16 preview, NFL player controversies

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include new insights into diabetes treatment, the search for extraterrestrial life, and the behavior of pollinators and memory storage in the brain.
news:news.news:keywords: breakthroughs in diabetes treatment, habitable exoplanets, honey bee behavior, insulin delivery advancements, deep-sea discoveries

news:news.news:title: Oil Prices Spike as Iran Conflict Disrupts Global Markets and Transportation Sectors
Meta and YouTube Found Liable in Landmark Social Media Addiction Trial, Sparking Legal Ripple Effects
